image.title: NAA Gesser-Edelsburg, R Cohen, NAE Shahbari, R Hijazi

item.title: A mixed-methods sequential explanatory design comparison between COVID-19 infection control guidelines' applicability and their protective value as perceived by Israeli healthcare workers, and healthcare executives' response.
